components.name: BareIconButton
components.description: Background-free icon-only button for very dense control clusters.
useCases: Compact icon-only affordances that should not add a hover fill
migrationHints: Use only when the surrounding layout is information-dense enough that a filled or ghost icon button adds visual noise.
Prefer Button size="icon" or size="icon-sm" when the action needs a visible hover surface.

components.name: Toaster
components.description: Sonner-backed notification viewport for rich transient notifications.
migrationHints: Use Toaster with the exported toast API when notifications need actions, placement, or longer duration than the compact Toast primitive.

components.name: toast
components.description: Command API for dispatching Sonner-backed notifications.
migrationHints: Prefer this exported toast API over direct sonner imports so consumers stay on the UI-system notification wrapper.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Compact boolean checkbox primitive for dense workbench forms and lists.
migrationHints: Replace local Radix checkbox wrappers with the shared Checkbox to keep token and focus treatment aligned.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Immediate on-off switch primitive for preference and runtime toggles.
migrationHints: Use the shared Switch instead of product-local toggles so checked and focus states stay consistent.

components.description: Tooltip root primitive for short contextual guidance and control labels.

components.description: Provider primitive for tooltip timing behavior.

components.description: Trigger primitive that anchors shared tooltip content.

components.description: Tooltip surface content primitive with shared workbench styling.

components.description: Tooltip portal primitive for layered rendering.

components.description: Popover root primitive for anchored floating workbench panels.

components.description: Trigger primitive that anchors popover content.

components.description: Shared popover surface primitive with workbench panel styling.

components.name: PopoverAnchor
components.description: Anchor primitive for explicit popover positioning.

components.name: PopoverPortal
components.description: Popover portal primitive for layered rendering.

components.name: PopoverClose
components.description: Close primitive for popover content actions.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input primitive aligned with shared workbench field tokens.
migrationHints: Prefer the shared Textarea over custom textarea classes so invalid, disabled, and focus states stay consistent.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Lightweight loading spinner primitive for inline and panel-level busy states.
migrationHints: Use Spinner instead of rotating icon ad-hoc classes when the intent is a generic busy indicator.

components.name: UnderlineTabs
components.description: Scrollable underline tab row primitive for dense pane navigation.

components.name: SectionTabs
components.description: Heading-sized tab row primitive for switching between peer content sections.
migrationHints: Use SectionTabs when tabs should visually match section headings instead of dense pane navigation.
